zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Grandmesnil於大約1070年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，她的父親Hugh de Grandmesnil39歲，母親Adeliza Beaumont32歲。她於大約1065年與William de Saye在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1094年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾韋斯特 蘭頓享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Grandmesnil was born about 1070, in Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Hugh de Grandmesnil, was 39 and her mother, Adeliza Beaumont, was 32. She married William de Saye about 1065, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1094, in West Langton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

Elle a épousé William de Saye environ 1065, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1094, à West Langton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Grandmesnilが約1070年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Hugh de Grandmesnilは39歳，母Adeliza Beaumontは32歳であった。約1065年にフランスノーマンディでWilliam de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1094年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウエスト ラントンで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Grandmesnil(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Grandmesnil(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza Beaumont(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1065년 프랑스 노먼디에서 William de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 웨스트 랭턴에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Grandmesnil родилась около 1070 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Grandmesnil было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Beaumont, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Saye около 1065 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1094 г. в местности вест лангтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.
